message: Improve AI demand selection and movement to reduce stalling
Add idle room cleanup sweep every 2 hours
Make lobby scrollable and cap room list to 5 visible rows
Fix solo game save/resume by excluding AI players from waiting room
Fix zoom-out hover twitching by caching container dimensions
Add resume lobby flow and save button UI (Save & Resume Phase 2)
Add server-side save/resume infrastructure (Phase 0 + Phase 1)
Add toggle to hide city goods icons on map
Add mountain pass corridors through Alps for traversable routes to Italy
Add How to Play tutorial dropdown to legend panel
Wire foreign track toggle to build commit with network-aware connectivity
Wire foreign track toggle to hover preview and cost label
Add foreign track toggle button to build phase UI
Add allowForeignTrack param to findPath() with foreignSegments return
Align deliver button with pickup button vertical midline
Shrink pickup button to match deliver button format
Improve pickup goods visibility with demand-matching highlights and larger buttons
Add ECU balance and phase/waiting indicator to train card
Prominent cash display, phase badges, and movement progress bar
Fix post-commit hook and increase recent updates to 20 commits
